data.body: Stack progress: fa98 (editor XSS, _js_embed) + cf1b (public detector_matches) both committed, closed & certified (completion-verifier PASS). 2/20 children done. Key learned constraints: (1) unscoped attestations (empty file_impact) are pinned to exact HEAD sha -> every code commit invalidates outstanding attestations, so each ticket needs review-plan --ref HEAD immediately before claim; (2) closing a bug needs --reason 'Fixed: ...'; (3) close verifies at ref=HEAD so must commit before close; closes commit only to tickets branch (code HEAD unmoved). Pipeline: after each commit, launch close-N and review-(N+1) concurrently. Stack head now 40d0f5ac8 (cf1b).
